listings.title: Treasure Me is Hosting an Online Auction in Sicklerville: SUNDAY July 26 Pickup, 10am-2pm
listings.company: Treasure Me Estate Sales 1-800-NOT-JUNK Free Consults
listings.description: Welcome to a quick sale out of a beautifully decorated home in Sicklerville. This lovely residence was filled with treasures. In this auction you'll find vintage porcelain lamps including Capodimonte and more. We've also got lots of home decor for all seasons, including spooky Halloween witches and lovely springtime trinkets. This pickup will take place SUNDAY July 26 from 10am-2pm. No one will be allowed inside the home, all items will be brought to winning bidders at the front door/parking lot. No shipping available for this auction. Happy bidding!

listings.title: Newtown Square Summer Sale - Bidding ends 7/22
listings.company: CTBIDS Brandywine
listings.description: Welcome Home to CTBids! We put together an excellent selection of items for you! Start exploring and discover the deals for yourself! Bidding on ALL items starts at $1! Our Newtown Square Summer Sale is filled with beautiful things from around the world. Italian, Portuguese and Asian Furniture, Decor, Collectibles and Art. Vintage Character and Advertising Glasses. Vintage Toys. Watches. Silverplate, Brass, Copper. Outstanding Mid Century Modern Daybed Sofas, Table, Chairs, Entertainment Center. Craftsman Style Bookcases. Banquet Sized Cookware. Small Kitchen Appliances. Tools and Tool Storage Chests. Snowblower, Leaf Blower, Chainsaw, John Deere E110 Lawn Tractor. Large Cash and Carry Sale for Winning Bidders! EVERYTHING MUST GO! Browse and bid on unique and everyday treasures at Brandywine.CTBids.com About Caring Transitions and CTBids: We are carefully managing the treasures and everyday household items for our clients as they downsize or transition to new homes. These items have quality, value, and a history that are a perfect fit for someone else. Our mission was to create a platform where these estate sales are brought to you online. Instead of set pricing, bidding starts at $1. This process allows our bidders to find unique and everyday treasures for a great value. In addition, the repurposing of these belongings will have a positive and lasting impact on the world we all share. CTBids gives us the ability to connect family heirlooms made with yesterday’s craftsmanship with new owners who will give them new LIFE . From unique treasures to everyday items, you will always find something interesting on CTBids! Everyone wins, including the environment! Transitions, by nature, can have profound effects on the environment, and we’re committed to mitigating these impacts. We care about the environment, and the necessity to repurpose household treasures. Caring Transitions is the nation’s largest and most trusted organization specializing in downsizing, relocation, estate sales, decluttering, home cleanouts, online auctions and other services. There are over 325 locations nationwide that are total solution providers for all of life’s transitions. Embrace new beginnings with confidence by learning more on our website ! ALL bidders need to register on CTBids, but registration is easy. We look forward to seeing you there! Bidding Just Got Easier! Download our new app in your app store today. Want to be the first to hear about our new sales? Follow us on Facebook ! Overwhelmed by your belongings? Learn more about our services visit our website !

listings.title: Thee Perfect Sale - THE ESTATE SALE OF YOUR DREAMS
listings.company: Thee Perfect Sale
listings.description: Step inside a home filled with decades of collecting, where every room tells a different story. These longtime collectors surrounded themselves with beautiful, whimsical, and unexpected treasures gathered over a lifetime. From colorful art glass, pink chandeliers, vintage lighting, daisy-themed décor, and designer fashion to collectible Christmas displays, religious artwork, Royal dinnerware, garden statuary, fountains, antique furniture, china cabinets, decorative accessories, rugs, books, and kitchen collectibles, there is something waiting around every corner. Whether you're a collector, decorator, reseller, or treasure hunter, this is the kind of sale where every room offers a new discovery—and where the next great find is always just one shelf away.

listings.title: Cherry Hill Estate Sale - From Leather to License Plates!
listings.company: White Pine Estate Sales & Auctions
listings.description: Stop by Cherry Hill! You’ll spot everything from a wheelbarrow and inflatable raft to a Schwinn 270 recumbent bike and galvanized planters. Indoors, the furniture collection ranges from an Indian carved elephant table to cozy couches, wood dressers, metal cabinets, and unique hand‑carved pieces. Home décor lovers will find kitchenware, lamps, art, baskets, holiday décor, books, and even vintage items like Kodak slides and ammo boxes. Clothing and accessories include a standout leather Italian Casino Cards/Poker Leather Jacket and a beautiful Sundt of Bergen wool sweater. For collectors there are baseball cards, license plates, vintage electronics, DVDs, VHS tapes, and Bose audio gear. Truly something for everyone -one day only! OUTDOOR & HOBBY Wheelbarrow, inflatable raft with paddles, hand tools, lawn & garden tools, shovels, Schwinn 270 Recumbent Exercise bike w/ Bluetooth, Galvanized tubs/planters, Remo hand drum, metal shelving and metal cabinets great for garage!, hand weights, baseball cards CLOTHING & JEWELRY Shoes, vintage Italian Fashion Casino Cards/Poker Leather Jacket, Sundt of Bergen hand knitted wool sweater from Norway, bracelets, necklaces, earrings, women's clothing ELECTRONICS DVDs, old Kodak slides, vintage electronics including desktop computers, DVD player, cassette tapes, VHS, Bose FURNITURE Small tables, Indian carved table with elephants, carts, chairs, benches, interesting hand carved wood pieces, dressers, desk, beds, couches, rocker with ottoman, nightstands, upholstered chairs, metal filing cabinets, bookshelves, wood bed with mattress and boxspring, rugs. HOME & DECOR Kitchenware including glassware, area rugs, small appliances and dishes, wood printer tray, Stangl, pots and pans, hanging lights, floor lamps, table lamps, frames, art including wall art, metal art, posters, linens, prints, baskets, BOOKS, knick knacks, ammo boxes, floral and holiday including CHRISTMAS AND HALLOWEEN, FALL. Dyson and Shark vacuum cleaners, Lands' End, metal file cabinets, wood folding chairs, license plates, clocks, Pfaltzgraff, Tiffany & Co. eyeglass cases, globe.

listings.title: Treasure Hunter's Dream—It's Wild in Westville!
listings.company: White Pine Estate Sales & Auctions
listings.description: For planning purposes, this sale is near Shady Lane School in Westville, New Jersey. So much more for us to go through - this listing will be updated right up until the sale. Additional pictures will be added continuously so keep checking back! After 30+ years of passionate hunting, a truly diverse collection is ready for new owners. This is not your average house sale—it is a time capsule packed with authentic sports memorabilia, autographed photos, ephemera, art, stamps, currency/coins, collectibles, electronics, antiques, everyday treasures and vintage items. Don’t miss this one! Hand tools, Vintage clothing, Rosenthal, antique furniture, old currency, Haviland pottery, Limoges, Noritake, Villeroy & Bosch, chrome racks. Autographed pictures of sports, celebrity, and political figures: Donald Trump, Muhammad Ali, Arnold Schwarzenegger, etc. Stuffed animals, Beanie Babies, fishing knives, folding knives, Navy memorabilia, antique clocks, stamps, letter collections. Coins, electronics, maps, handmade model tall ships, DVDs and VHS. Postcard collections, toys, trading card collections including boxing, basketball, other sports, Star Trek & military. TONS of books, patches, magazines, comic books, shrunken heads, political signs, Olympic memorabilia, vintage photos. Knickknacks, tons of figurines and collectibles, beer steins, HOLIDAY, Authentic American flags used at Capitol building (certified). Rock ‘n’ roll items, CDs, vinyl, autographs & memorabilia. Tons of framed pictures, posters, unique finds, vintage photos, scrimshaw, sculptures, paintings, risqué vintage photos. Antique cast iron waffle makers & cookie presses, brass, cameras, Delft, Jasperware, nesting dolls, vintage t-shirts. Haag, commercial shredder, vintage cookie jars, Gemmy clown costumes, dolls, Fenton, treadle sewing base, Polish folk art plates, Waterford, trains, pewter, Murano, blue & pink glass. Windham Heights Cobblestone Collectibles, lighters, Lane blanket chests, flatware, vintage ashtrays, fabric. Tins, Tony Stewart, Ed Hardy motorcycle helmet, Nippon china, Trenton china, walnut bookshelf, Mikasa, brass jewelry scale, Union National antique dresser, alabaster, S&P, Irish linens. Premium cookware, crystal, copper, tons of small appliances, glassware, and everyday home essentials.
